http:request.sendCorrelationId: #[(if (((vars['pluginConfig'] default {})['sendCorrelationId'] default null) == true) 'ALWAYS' else if (((vars['pluginConfig'] default {})['sendCorrelationId'] default null) == false) 'NEVER' else 'AUTO')]
http:request.doc:name: HTTP Request

logger.doc:name: Logger Retryable Error
logger.message: #[output application/json indent=false --- {event: 'integration_error_retryable', correlationId: correlationId, errorType: ((error.errorType.namespace default 'UNKNOWN') as String) ++ ':' ++ ((error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN') as String), description: (error.description default 'Retryable HTTP request error') as String, payload: (write(error.errorMessage.payload) default "")}]

logger.doc:name: Logger Non Retryable Error
logger.message: #[output application/json indent=false --- {event: 'integration_error_non_retryable', correlationId: correlationId, errorType: ((error.errorType.namespace default 'UNKNOWN') as String) ++ ':' ++ ((error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN') as String), description: (error.description default 'Non retryable HTTP request error') as String, payload: (write(error.errorMessage.payload) default "")}]

raise-error.description: #[(vars.pluginNonRetryableError.description ++ ":" ++ (write(vars.pluginNonRetryableError.errorMessage.payload default "")) default 'Non retryable HTTP request error')]
raise-error.doc:name: Raise Non Retryable Error

logger.doc:name: Logger Response
